testcase.name: S1 - Subscription of the first month. PCN Configuration: set to 10% of each subscription, PCN applies to all products, countries, cities, companies.

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given "PM1-A" has subscribed a plan A at the beginning of this month with a subscription charge $40.undefined And "PM2-A" has subscribed a plan B at the beginning of this month with a subscription charge $40.skipped And "PM1-A" has subscribed a plan C at the beginning of this month with a subscription charge $50.skipped When PCN is set to 10% of Subscription and applied to all products, countries, Cities,companies.skipped And Minimum PCN charge is set to $20........................................skipped And PCN charge is calculated at 10% of the each subscription................skipped And PCN charge is based on the previous month's subscription(s).............skipped And This is first month of the subscriptions of this company................skipped Then PCN charge for this is 0...............................................skipped
